description: Evals for the gather phase of the split PR review pipeline. Run in a local model session. Measures completeness, before-block accuracy, and classification correctness.

evals.name: completeness
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on the current branch (or a specified branch with at least one changed file).
evals.expected_output: All 7 output files created under notes/pr-reviews/{branch}/. Each file is non-empty. gather-summary.md contains file count, issue count by type, draft rating, and completeness checklist.
scoring: raw-diff.md exists and contains git diff output (not empty)
context.md exists and contains a '## Memory' section and '## Phase Plan' section
per-file-analysis.md has one '## File:' section per file listed in the diff stat
draft-review.md contains all 4 axis scores (Plan & Spec, Architecture, Rust Style, Test Coverage)
draft-fix-document.md either lists Issue N: blocks or states 'No fixes required'
draft-fix-plan.toml is parseable TOML with [tasks.*] sections OR states '# No fix tasks'
gather-summary.md contains issue counts, rating, and completeness checklist

evals.name: before-block-accuracy
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on a branch that has at least 2 fixable issues. Verify the before blocks in draft-fix-plan.toml.
evals.expected_output: Every 'before' block in draft-fix-plan.toml is an exact substring of the target file in the branch. The self-check (Step 6) should confirm each block.
scoring: Each before block can be found via: rg -F '{before_content}' {file_path}
No before blocks contain '...' or placeholder text like '[...]'
No before blocks are empty strings
gather-summary.md 'Before-block verification' section lists N/M ratio where N == M (all confirmed)

evals.name: classification-correctness
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on a branch that was previously reviewed with the full /review-pr skill (ground truth available). Compare classifications.
evals.expected_output: All issues use exactly [Defect], [Correctness], or [Improvement] as their classification. Issues marked [Improvement] do NOT appear in draft-fix-document.md or draft-fix-plan.toml.
scoring: Every issue in draft-review.md uses exactly one of: [Defect], [Correctness], [Improvement]
No other classification strings appear (e.g. [Bug], [Style], [Note])
All issues in draft-fix-document.md have Classification: Defect or Classification: Correctness
[Improvement] items from draft-review.md are absent from draft-fix-document.md
[Improvement] items from draft-review.md are absent from draft-fix-plan.toml

evals.name: cross-subagent-consistency
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on a branch and check for contradictions between per-file-analysis.md and draft-review.md, and between cross-reference claims and source documents.
evals.expected_output: No contradictions between subagent outputs. Cross-reference validator (Step 4b) passes on first attempt. Per-file-analysis claims about file state match draft-review claims about the same files.
scoring: cross-reference-validation.md exists and shows Verdict: PASS with 0 contradictions on first attempt
No file state assertion in per-file-analysis.md contradicts the same assertion in draft-review.md
Draft review does not re-flag items that per-file-analysis explicitly confirms as resolved
Per-file analysis manifest citations match actual manifest values in file-manifest.json
cross-reference.md lists each considered issue with a Verdict and Action (including DROPPED items)

evals.name: fix-plan-audit
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on a branch that has a committed fix-plan.toml from a prior round with unapplied tasks. Verify the audit gate (Step 1.5) detects them.
evals.expected_output: validate-fix-plan-application.py correctly identifies unapplied tasks. Gather-summary.md reports the audit results. Draft review re-flags unapplied tasks as current issues.
scoring: validate-fix-plan-application.py exits 1 and lists unapplied tasks when before blocks still exist in source
validate-fix-plan-application.py exits 0 and reports no unapplied tasks when all before blocks have been applied
gather-summary.md contains a 'Prior fix-plan audit' section with the unapplied count
Unapplied tasks from prior fix-plan are re-flagged as issues in draft-review.md
No false positives: applied before blocks are correctly reported as not found in source

evals.name: context-awareness
evals.prompt: Run /review-pr-gather on a branch that has been previously reviewed (context.md snapshot exists). Check that the re-review accounts for prior round history.
evals.expected_output: Cross-reference framing decision accounts for review history. Items listed as resolved in snapshot are not re-flagged as current issues. Rating and framing are consistent with re-review context.
scoring: cross-reference.md Review Framing Decision section correctly identifies re-review round if snapshot exists
Draft review rating is consistent with review round (Approve for re-review unless new issues found)
No items re-flagged as current [Defect]/[Correctness]/[Improvement] that context.md snapshot lists as resolved
Cross-reference validator (Step 4b) does not flag framing as CONTEXT BLINDNESS
Gather-summary mentions review history (round number, prior fixes applied) or explicitly states 'no prior review'
